nasb.text: To make you know the certainty of the words of truth That you may correctly answer him who sent you?

esv.text: to make you know what is right and true, that you may give a true answer to those who sent you?

cnv.text: 要教你認識確實的真理， 使你把真理回覆那差派你來的人。

ccb.text: 要使你认识真理， 能准确答复差你来的人。

csbs.text: 那是要让你明白确实的真理之言， 好用真理之言回应派遣你来的人。
